takes.s p 500 futures steady as big tech rebou: Oil dips as oversupply and demand softness outweigh geopolitical tensions.
takes.hormuz tanker crossings sink to lowest l: Lower tanker crossings highlight risk, but oversupply keeps prices suppressed.
takes.u s will use iranian funds to pay for sh: Iranian funds' use does not directly impact supply; no price effect.
takes.oil prices fall below 100 but u s iran t: Tensions rise, but oversupply continues to cap war premium.
takes.iran us war trump is in revenge mode aft: Escalation rhetoric adds risk, but oversupply dominates price direction.
